products.name: Aura Oversized Silk Shirt
products.description: Crafted from heavy sandwashed silk, this oversized top features dropped shoulders and a sleek, hidden placket for the ultimate minimalist aesthetic.

products.name: Linen Tailored Trousers
products.description: High-waisted trousers tailored from organic Belgian flax linen. Features deep pleats and a relaxed wide-leg silhouette.

products.name: Minimalist Brass Choker
products.description: Hand-forged raw brass choker. Simple, structural, and striking. Designed to age beautifully with a unique patina.

products.name: Structured Leather Tote
products.description: Sleek architectural tote bag constructed from full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. Fits a 15-inch laptop.

products.name: Void Knit Cardigan
products.description: Heavyweight ribbed cotton-wool blend cardigan with raw edges and an oversized, enveloping cocoon shape.
